title: Living in America
why_this_song: Living in America by James Brown (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 27 times; first heard in: "Living in america, eye to eye, station to station"
Appears 19 times; first heard in: "Living in america, eye to eye, station to station"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I live in america, I live in america, wait a minute"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Detroit city (detroit city)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Living in america, hand in hand, across the nation"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Living in america, so nice with your best self
Living in america, oh, I feel good
Superhighways, coast to coast, easy takin' anywhere
How does it feel when there's no destination that's too far

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "america" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "america" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "living" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "living" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Superhighways, coast to coast, easy takin' anywhere
On a black coffee and a hard roll

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Living in America" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Living in America" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Living in America" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Living in America", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Living in America" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Living in America" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
